## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      2 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jul 16, 2026 - Jul 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Hero Dotus_, Jul 16, 2026, 1/5: "Annoying pop up ads, uninstalled. You already have paid features locked behind a paywall. The ads make it useless."
            2. _John Doe_, Jul 16, 2026, 1/5: "the ads are getting more annoying and intrusive, smh i would rather pay for TV if this keeps getting worse and worse, your "news" update is dogwater and the ui isnt good as others, the price accuracy is also getting worse than others, TV is lagging but atleast their price are always correct"
